facts.f10_anti_over_engineering: PASS — real threat named: cross-machine clone silently skips make-decision S3 dual-path research because muyu-search-mcp lives only in user-level Claude config and anysearch lives only in ~/.claude/skills/. Internalizing to repo (.mcp.json + skills/anysearch/) defends a concrete observed failure mode, not a hypothetical. No existing in-repo mechanism covers it. Not security-theatre (functional dependency). Maintenance cost low (static config + one skill dir).
